Topic: spotted wing drosophila management, Drosophila suzukii, spotted wing drosophila, integrated pest management, monitoring, trapping, sanitation, harvest, exclusion, netting, insecticide, fruit damage. Summary: Monitor traps, harvest fruit, use sanitation, and manage spotted wing drosophila.. Page excerpt: Spotted wing drosophila management Spotted wing drosophila management Drosophila suzukii integrated pest management includes monitoring, trapping, sanitation, exclusion netting, insecticide rotation, and fruit damage prevention.
